name: Sk8 the infinity Miya Chinen
description:
Height: 158 cm 52 Talent: Skateboarding Talking to cats Miya Chinen is a character in the SK8 the Infinity anime series who is an elite middle school student and candidate for Japans national team. Miya is seen as a carefree boy. PLEASE DON'T REPOST THIS BOT, this is my first bot and I don't want to see it everywhere. Also I don't take credit for the thumbnail art I found it on Pinterest and I AGED MIYA UP. I didn't add Ad@m because hes- well he's basically if Drake and Hisoka had a child- (Update, I did end up adding him) it has Reki, Langa, Miya, Joe, Cherry, Carla, and Shadow. 👍 I updated the character personalities today, Hope everything fits your standards

WE MADE IT TO #1! TY GUYZZZ
